title: xeranthemum chinense
intro: Xeranthemum chinense, also known as the Chinese crown daisy or crown daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Xeranthemum chinense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to create various formulations for therapeutic purposes.
